Users Only of Legal Age of Majority
Our Site is designed and intended for those who have reached the age of majority (18 years of age). By using our Site, you affirm that you are at least 18 years of age or older. We are not liable for any damages that may result from a user's misrepresentation of age.
No one under age 13 is authorized to submit or post any information, including personally identifying information, on our Site. Under no circumstances may anyone under age 13 use our Site. Parents or legal guardians of children under 13 cannot agree to these Terms on their behalf
By using this Site, you consent to the use of information as described in this Privacy Policy. We do update this Privacy Policy from time to time so please review this Privacy Policy regularly. If you do not agree with the changes, then you should stop using the Site.
Articles on this site may include embedded content (e.g. videos, images, articles, etc.). Embedded content from other websites behaves in the exact same way as if the visitor has visited the other website.
These websites may collect data about you, use cookies, embed additional third-party tracking, and monitor your interaction with that embedded content, including tracing your interaction with the embedded content
The site might automatically include cookies on your browser
Google Analytics checks the number of visitors to the site and where they come from.
Please refer to the appropriate Google Analytics documentation for the specific type of data it collects.
title: Writing

contents:
Considerations_2
Twilight Courier
When I think of the near forgotten dream of someone quite dear to me
I imagine a conversation with you
Your advice and patient listening
And so
Here again
The thoughts of the sublime
And a missed opportunity
Return
After a long voyage
Once again
In study of the maps and charts
Still in search of those expressions found not of mortal substance
title: Considerations 2

contents:
Twilight Courier
Darkweb User$.Ribbons. Post Subject - aanimals
Icosaalopex – unfrequent
The vault Unhinged
Unhindering
And Uncommon
Now
Checklist
Animal Whistle - 44100 Hz
Common Format
Coincidence?
Not So
An animal whistle
CryptoLupine
For what else are they?
Vittles
Checklist
Red Plastic Box
Iodine
Radiotrophic Fungi
Tweezers
Binding Gauze
Checklist
Satchel – nanotech in order, 50000kg
10,000,000 RMB
The prey beyond the Gate
title: Dinosaur_hunger_44100

contents:
Frustrated
Twilight Courier
Though your frustrated if you express it in this way
you will find yourself no longer a person
no longer capable of love
and having the certainty that your soul was lost along the way
title: Frustrated

contents:
Ghosts Of The Fogg
Twilight Courier
the tides stop
like they do
every year
bringing The Fogg
and the ghosts to appear
haul in your boats
and stay close to shore
harboring grief
as The Fogg draws near
bar the doors shut
staying warm by the fire
and rest easy
in the good company of those whom you hold dear
mad drunken howls
the guards at their post
ringing the bells
for the lonely and lost
send out the candles
on small wooden boards
to light up the coast
as the tides come to a pause
say your prayers that The Fogg doesn’t stay
over our country
on this solemn day
title: Ghosts Of The Fogg

contents:
Scattered
By Twilight Courier
Looking into the origins of the subculture
She had lost her soul long ago to their marketing schemes
And noticing her hips as her dress fell everywhere but off
He then withdrew into the hermitage to eat a healthy diet of oats and fungus
But not before committing to spectacular changes
That would bring the evocation of gentle strings
Screaming
Like a noxious renegade
Shifting gears
To try and deal with the pandemic blues
Until his second departure would mean leaving once more
title: Scattered

contents:
The Dragons of the Sea
Twilight Courier
The dragons of the sea
Once soared in majesty
beneath the clouds
Imagination,
wonder of the world
their grace and sweeping waves
the plastic seas, the dragons choke
corpses on the beach
littered with waste
ancient form
skeletons rotting away
consuming refuse and debris
Consequence of the disposable
The beauty of the world
What is granted to us
Thrown Away
title: The Dragons of the Sea
Callen Duel - Bearers Of The Marigold now released

contents:
Solid-State Physics
Twilight Courier
She was a Woman who inspired poetry
So it is no surprise that her departure inspired a poem
Her influence remained
An elegant sadness in the approach
A change in technique
Something the great masters of the art all knew
title: Solid-State Physics

contents:
Summer's End Storm
Twilight Courier
the city is not as it used to be
a cowardly man flees during the storm
his dog moves frantically, but certainly with purpose to find the coward who had abandoned him
and from the bridge one of the most beautiful views of the hills
and from the bushes comes a vagrant stumbling from the recent injection
and from the fallen trees the path is blocked
the
thunder booms
in realization
title: Summer's End Storm

contents:
When I Set Off I Was A Troubled Man
Twilight Courier
When I set off I was a troubled man
And I only returned with different troubles
I realized the blight of compassion dying
That staying would take my soul
And in preservation of empathy
I left once again, quickly and without regret
title: When I Set Off I Was A Troubled Man
